bird.name: 帕勞角鴞
bird.summary: 帕勞角鴞（學名Pyrroglaux podarginus）是一種貓頭鷹。它們以往被分類在角鴞屬中，但現已重置為獨立的屬中。它們是帛琉的特有種。

locations.name: 帛琉
locations.summary: 帛琉共和國（英語：Republic of Palau；帕勞語：Beluu er a Belau；日語：パラオ共和国，羅馬化：Parao Kyōwakoku），通稱帛琉或帕勞（Palau，旧称Belau或Pelew）是位于西太平洋的岛嶼国家…

relations.subject: 帕勞角鴞
relations.evidence: They are endemic to the Palau Islands in the western Pacific, where they are found in woodland and lagoon trees, ravines and mangrove swamps

relations.subject: 帕勞角鴞
relations.evidence: They are endemic to the Palau Islands in the western Pacific, where they are found in woodland and lagoon trees, ravines and mangrove swamps
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
